name: Tansun Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tansun Technology Co., Ltd. provides long-term information technology (IT) solutions and services for financial industry customers in China and internationally. It offers supply chain finance consulting services, transaction banking solutions, integrated risk management systems, retail bank IT architecture consulting services, retail credit product delivery systems, business consulting and joint operating platforms, performance management consulting solutions, business intelligence and big data applications, micro service container cloud platforms, and workflow engines. The company also provides TREE, a financial business application; professional IT planning consultation and project implementation services; and wind control models for retail credit business, such as credit granting, lending, and post-lending. In addition, it offers risk control, open banking, and data governance solutions, as well as industrial financial platforms; automated testing, non-functional testing, big data platform testing, data migration validation, and demand labeling solutions, as well as testing consultation services. It serves central banks, political banks, state-owned banks, joint-stock banks, local commercial banks, and non-banking financial institutions. Tansun Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Lhasa, China.
